title: Vanilla Polished
description: A small vanilla-like texture pack that doesn't change much — just a few textures here and there that could look a little nicer.
body:
**_🎨 A clean, vanilla-like texture pack that makes Minecraft feel just a little more polished — without changing what makes it Minecraft._**

![FEATURE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c4ed20e33cb1f71b1d85d6188580b2adab4c9dc.png)

**Reworked weapons & tools** — swords, axes, pickaxes, shovels, bows and spears all have cleaner, more defined textures that are easy to recognize at a glance

**Full armor set refresh** — leather, iron, gold, diamond and netherite armor pieces all got a subtle but noticeable visual improvement

**Better food & consumables** — apples, cooked food and other consumables look more detailed and appetizing

**Reworked gems & ingots** — emeralds, diamonds, gold nuggets, iron and gold ingots all look sharper and more distinct

**Darker inventory UI** — the inventory and crafting screen have been given a sleeker, darker look that feels more modern and is much easier on the eyes during long sessions


![OVERVIEW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28b53fa22440cc2c301c4b8c131f9dfdd995b344.png)

This pack doesn't try to reinvent Minecraft. It keeps the default feel completely intact — the same style, the same colors, the same vibe you already know. The goal was simple: take a few things that always felt a bit rough in vanilla and make them look just a bit better. That's it.
You install it, you play, and at some point you just notice that everything looks nicer. No jarring changes, no textures that feel out of place, no "wait, what item is this?" moments.

### 👍 Perfect for

Survival & SMP servers
Players who love vanilla but want a small visual upgrade
Anyone who spends a lot of time staring at their inventory


### 📦 Resolution
### 
16×16 — pure vanilla resolution, zero performance impact.

### 🔧 Requirements

Minecraft Java Edition
